scripts.build: pnpm --filter @drophere/deploy-core run build && pnpm --filter @drophere/cli run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @drophere/deploy-core run test && pnpm --filter @drophere/cli run test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @drophere/deploy-core run build && pnpm --filter @drophere/cli run typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm skill:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
